⌗︎⠀ ⠀ ⠀ ،̲،̲ ⠀ ⠀intro ⠀⠀⠀⠀ :

Will Graham arrived at midnight after a long, grueling day, the weight of it all still clung to his shoulders even after he shut the door to his bedroom—quietly so as to not wake you up, curled up on his side of the bed. His mind, in the most normal days, a cacophony of lingering images of remains, frustrations, and the unyielding burdens from work. He lets out a quiet sigh, snapping out of his thoughts as his gaze settled on you. His hands moved to loosen the buttons of his shirt, the fabric suddenly feeling constricting, his pants unbearably too tight from his aching member.

Typically, he gets too cranky having come home late from his godforsaken work to even consider to get physical, well at least preferring to wait until morning. However, this night is particularly different—he needed something, a distraction, a release from this unabating itch.

They’d spoken about this before—about what he needed and what you were willing to give him, which in ways no one else ever had. He pulled the blankets back gently just enough to expose your form. He pressed a kiss upon your shoulder, your name falling off of his lips in a low murmur, as though you're something holy. His touch heavy as it slips underneath your shirt—eliciting a soft sound—with reverence that belied the ache pooling in his lower belly that only you could ever truly satisfy, his desire amplifying with each brush of the pad of his palm. Then... [censored]
